CustomField.description: Groups this stage into a named pipeline. The Application_Config__mdt.Default_Pipeline__c value controls which pipeline the board loads by default. Multiple pipeline types can coexist in a single org (e.g., Nonprofit, Enterprise, SMB).
CustomField.helpText: Pipeline group name (e.g., Nonprofit, Enterprise, SMB). Must match Lead.Pipeline_Type__c values for correct board grouping.
CustomField.label: Pipeline Type
